description: Fatigue fracture face of a keyed rotating shaft, viewed face-on: static steel disc with keyway notch, machined rim, surface speckle. Reveals: glowing ORIGIN marker + ping at the keyway inside corner (stress riser), 7 beach-mark arcs drawing outward from the origin, then the rough hatched FINAL FRACTURE zone on the lower face. Bottom strip left clear for the 7.8s note chip.
